visual.name: sOAKBusinessCentralFinancial
visual.displayName: SOAK Dynamics 365 Business Central Financial Visual
visual.description: Displays Dynamics 365 Business Central Chart of Accounts as a financial report with headings, indentation, and totals.

dataRoles.name: accountType
dataRoles.description: Account type: Posting, Heading, Total, Begin-Total, End-Total

dataRoles.name: totaling
dataRoles.description: The totaling expression for the account

dataRoles.name: indentation
dataRoles.description: The indentation level of the account (0, 1, 2, ...)

dataRoles.name: columns
dataRoles.description: Optional: field to create column groups (matrix/pivot layout)

dataRoles.name: accountGroup
dataRoles.description: Account category for the grouped summary view

dataRoles.name: accountSubGroup
dataRoles.description: Account sub-category for the grouped summary view

dataRoles.name: amount
dataRoles.description: The net change or balance amount

dataRoles.name: columnSort
dataRoles.description: Optional: sort field for column groups (e.g., Month No. when Columns uses Month Name)
